plugin.name: SiriusXM
plugin.changes: - Add precaching of playlist and segmenets - Track login cookies independantly of channel cookies. - Cache cookies, channel data and retain between restarts(prevents login on every channel change) - Download the smallest playlist size needed. - Track Playing timestamp against xmplaylist.com play time for metadata sync. - Make sure player is not a sync-slave when updating metadata (1.0.1)
plugin.title: SiriusXM
plugin.desc: Stream SiriusXM satellite radio through Lyrion Music Server
plugin.creator: paul-1
